de.uka.ilkd.key.macros

Class FullPropositionalExpansionMacro

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.AbstractProofMacro
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.StrategyProofMacro
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.AbstractPropositionalExpansionMacro
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.FullPropositionalExpansionMacro
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ProofMacro

    public class FullPropositionalExpansionMacro
extends AbstractPropositionalExpansionMacro
    The macro FullPropositionalExpansionMacro apply rules to decompose propositional toplevel formulas; it even splits the goal if necessary. The rules that are applied can be set in ADMITTED_RULES.

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.ProofMacro

        ProofMacro.ProgressBarListener

    • Method Detail

      • getName

        public java.lang.String getName()
        Description copied from interface: ProofMacro
        Gets the name of this macro. Used as menu entry
        Returns:
        a non-null constant string

      • getDescription

        public java.lang.String getDescription()
        Description copied from interface: ProofMacro
        Gets the description of this macro. Used as tooltip.
        Returns:
        a non-null constant string

      • getScriptCommandName

        public java.lang.String getScriptCommandName()
        Description copied from class: AbstractProofMacro
        Gets a unique short name for this macro that can be used in proof scripts. If null is returned, the macro cannot be addressed from within scripts. By default, proof macros do not support scripts, thus null is returned.
        Specified by:
        getScriptCommandName in interface ProofMacro
        Overrides:
        getScriptCommandName in class AbstractProofMacro
        Returns:
        null if not supported, or a non-null constant string as the short name

      • getAdmittedRuleNames

        protected java.util.Set<java.lang.String> getAdmittedRuleNames()
        Description copied from class: AbstractPropositionalExpansionMacro
        Gets the set of admitted rule names.
        Specified by:
        getAdmittedRuleNames in class AbstractPropositionalExpansionMacro
        Returns:
        a constant non-null set

      • allowOSS

        protected boolean allowOSS()
        Description copied from class: AbstractPropositionalExpansionMacro
        Whether this macro includes One Step Simplification.
        Specified by:
        allowOSS in class AbstractPropositionalExpansionMacro
